de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface RuleApp

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IBuiltInRuleApp
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractContractRuleApp, BlockContractBuiltInRuleApp, CloseAfterJoinRuleBuiltInRuleApp, ContractRuleApp, DefaultBuiltInRuleApp, JoinRuleBuiltInRuleApp, LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp, NoPosTacletApp, OneStepSimplifierRuleApp, PosTacletApp, RuleAppSMT, TacletApp, UninstantiatedNoPosTacletApp, UseDependencyContractApp

    public interface RuleApp

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean complete()
      returns true if all variables are instantiated
      ImmutableList<Goal> execute(Goal goal, Services services)
      applies the specified rule at the specified position if all schema variables have been instantiated
      PosInOccurrence posInOccurrence()
      returns the PositionInOccurrence (representing a SequentFormula and a position in the corresponding formula) of this rule application
      Rule rule()
      returns the rule of this rule application

    • Method Detail

      • rule

        Rule rule()
        returns the rule of this rule application

      • posInOccurrence

        PosInOccurrence posInOccurrence()
        returns the PositionInOccurrence (representing a SequentFormula and a position in the corresponding formula) of this rule application

      • execute

        ImmutableList<Goal> execute(Goal goal,
                          Services services)
        applies the specified rule at the specified position if all schema variables have been instantiated
        Parameters:
        goal - the Goal where to apply the rule
        services - the Services encapsulating all java information
        Returns:
        list of new created goals

      • complete

        boolean complete()
        returns true if all variables are instantiated
        Returns:
        true if all variables are instantiated
